name: new user accepts invite and is authenticated in inviting tenant
invited user can decline invite
user with USER role is blocked from accessing /usuarios
multi-tenant login shows TenantPicker then redirects to /inicio after workspace selection
workspace switch via sidebar updates the active workspace
admin sees members list with role and date on /usuarios
USER role does not see "Usuários" link in sidebar
full registration creates user and workspace then redirects to /inicio with active workspace in sidebar
invited user can accept invite and join tenant
parent filter shows only tasks of selected user story; clearing shows all
card displays display key, type badge and parent reference
/inicio with active project shows SummaryCards with visible counters
admin creates invite and it appears in pending invites list
"view child board" on Feature navigates to USER_STORY board with parent pre-selected
switching board type changes visible columns
creating a project makes it appear in the project list
creating a work item places it in the initial column
invalid invite token shows error and no accept form
type filter shows only items of selected type; clearing shows all
drag-and-drop moves card to target column and persists after reload
navigating to project detail updates URL to /projetos/:id
clicking a card opens CardModal with correct title, type and status
selecting active project updates ProjectSelector and board shows project content
invalid invite token shows error
clicking an item opens detail with same ID
logout clears session and subsequent access to protected page redirects to /login
admin cancels invite and it is removed from pending list
tree view expands Feature to show child US, then expand US to show child Tasks
registration with existing email shows error message and stays on /register
